name: O-7 per-rule canary: promotion to block refuses when fp-log is non-empty (recent FPs in window)
command: mkdir -p tree rubric/fp-log && printf '{"fp":1}\n' > rubric/fp-log/g-ts-test.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/canary-promote.sh" --rule-id g-ts-test --to block --tree "$PWD/tree" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'fp-log non-empty' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
